releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.0.8

新功能
- 首次安装引导页：全新安装后自动展示欢迎介绍和快速上手引导
- 版本更新日志弹窗：应用更新后首次启动自动弹出更新日志
- 无缝覆盖更新：应用内更新静默覆盖安装，无需卸载旧版本
- 安装器智能识别：自动区分首次安装和版本升级场景
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.0.8

New Features
- Onboarding guide: Welcome and quick start guide shown on first install
- Update changelog modal: Automatically shows release notes after update
- Seamless in-place updates: Silent overwrite installation without uninstalling old version
- Smart installer: Automatically detects first install vs upgrade scenarios
